hooks.command: sh -c 'for root in "${AGENT_HOME:-}" "$HOME/.codex/agent-harness"; do if [ -f "$root/core/CORE.md" ] && [ -x "$root/adapters/codex/hooks/run-hook.sh" ]; then exec "$root/adapters/codex/hooks/run-hook.sh" sessionstart-lifecycle.py; fi; done; echo "agent harness Codex hook launcher not found" >&2; exit 69'
